title: Stabilize and verify natural-language search controls on Published Content view
notes: Human suggestion #15 reports that the natural-language search control on /content/ disappeared. Current template still includes the NL request textarea and dialogue-language selector, so likely causes are conditional rendering drift, route/template mismatch, or a regression in deployed branch/assets. Track this as a low-priority but user-visible regression investigation: (1) confirm which deployed environment/URL reproduces, (2) verify authenticated vs anonymous rendering paths, (3) add a focused view/template test asserting nl_query + dialogue_language controls render on content_list, and (4) if deployment-only, add release checklist item to sanity-check /content/ search controls.
